clusters.title: Venezuelans make desperate pleas for help a week after devastating double earthquake
clusters.neutral_headline: Venezuelans make desperate pleas for help a week after devastating double earthquake
bullet_summary: Venezuelans in the coastal city of La Guaira are pleading for heavy machinery to assist in ongoing rescue operations more than a week after a double earthquake devastated the area
5 quakes devastated the area one week ago and at least 2,200 people have died

items.title: Venezuelans make desperate pleas for help a week after devastating double earthquake
items.standfirst: Venezuelans in the coastal city of La Guaira are pleading for heavy machinery to assist in ongoing rescue operations more than a week after a double earthquake devastated the area. Magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 quakes devastated the area one week ago and at least 2,200 people have died. People on the ground have faced a desperate wait for help to find family members lost under the rubble. Frustration is growing in the community as they ask where the government is, and why help has not arrived.
items.content: Venezuelans in the coastal city of La Guaira are pleading for heavy machinery to assist in ongoing rescue operations more than a week after a double earthquake devastated the area. Magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 quakes devastated the area one week ago and at least 2,200 people have died. People on the ground have faced a desperate wait for help to find family members lost under the rubble. Frustration is growing in the community as they ask where the government is, and why help has not arrived.
